description:
Genealogical lists. On recto:
- The first section is the genealogy of Moshe and David Maimonides. Headed ʿitrat al-rayyis. The names are ʿOvadyahu, Shelomo, ʿOvad[ya], [Yo]sef, Yiṣḥaq, Yosef, Maymūn, Moshe and David.
- Then Berakhot and his two sons Yosef and Moshe Zaqen ha-ʿEda.
- Then five generations of the family of al-Degel: Elʿazar and his sons Ṣedaqa ha-Ḥazzan, Moshe, and Avraham Degel ha-Yeshiva; his two sons Moshe ha-Talmid and Nadiv הנדיב והשוע Degel ha-Yeshiva; his son Yosef ha-Dayyan ha-Maskil; his son Avraham ha-Talmid, who died. 

On verso:
- The family of Ibn Nufayʿ: ʿAmram, his son Moshe, his son Nadiv, his son ʿAmram. Maḍmūn and his brother Yefet and Shelomo. This section partially overlaps with T-S AS 148.5 (PGPID 4164).
- The family of al-ʿAjamī: Elʿazar ha-[...] and his son Evyatar Rosh. 
- The family of al-Mashshāṭī: Ḥananya . . . Avraham, his three sons Saʿadya who died, Ḥayyim and his son Peraḥya, and Ḥananʾel. His son Menashshe Rosh ha-Qahal and his brother Ḥayyim and his brother Shemuʾel ha-Nadiv.

(Information in part from Goitein's index card.)
description_he: רשימות גנאלוגיות: פנים: עצרת הרייס כולל אילן יוחסין של הרמב"ם; כן: ברכות ובניו; ומשפחת אל-דגל; גב: משפחת בן נופיע; משפחת אל-עג'מי; משפחת אל-מששאטי
